mapper.sql: id, order_no, customer_name, total_amount, status, remark, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, is_deleted
id, order_id, item_name, quantity, unit_price, subtotal, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders
is_deleted = 0
AND (order_no LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR customer_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT FROM orders WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT updated_at FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (id, order_no, customer_name, total_amount, status, remark, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, is_deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderNo}, #{customerName}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, 0)

INSERT INTO order_items (id, order_id, item_name, quantity, unit_price, subtotal, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted)
SELECT #{item.id}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.subtotal}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, 0 FROM DUAL
